action_items.task: Attend makeup UA at the testing center
action_items.context: Client missed the previous UA on Thursday due to a bus breakdown.

action_items.task: Call PO's desk directly if there is any issue or emergency preventing attendance at the makeup UA
action_items.context: A second missed test will result in an automatic violation.

critical_updates.details: Client secured and renewed her lease for another six months at the apartment on Elm.
Client continues to work part-time in customer service at Walmart.
Client missed a UA last Thursday due to a broken down bus on Route 12. Client left a voicemail at the testing center. PO waived the violation based on two recent clean UAs but mandated a makeup test.
Client is experiencing high stress and anxiety but is managing it by seeing Dr. Evans bi-weekly for cognitive behavioral work.

next_episode_context: Chloe is maintaining stability with her housing (recently renewed her lease for six months) and employment (working part-time at Walmart). She missed her UA last Thursday due to a public transit failure, which caused her significant anxiety. The PO accepted her explanation given her recent history of clean UAs and scheduled a mandatory makeup UA for this coming Friday at 2:00 PM. She continues bi-weekly therapy with Dr. Evans for anxiety and catastrophic thinking.
